Kadir Has University

Faculty of Law

In addition to classical legal education, the aim is to provide students with team work skills and the ability to produce concrete products. With a curriculum revised in line with the entrance exam for legal professions, students will be enabled to both increase their professional competencies and prepare for the challenges of the future.
